title: narcissus tazetta var. primulinus
intro: Narcissus tazetta var. primulinus, also known as the autumn-flowering narcissus, is a variety of the daffodil plant that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compounds that can be used to treat various health conditions, such as fever and digestive issues. The health benefits of Narcissus tazetta var. primulinus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, where it is valued for its antiseptic and expectorant properties.
